text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Sübscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appellé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deur Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; diß gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4°.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. à <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":8,"explanation":"1. Changed all `&` to `&` in text content to make valid XML (3 occurrences: "Francois & Latin", "Erudition & de Critique", "d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante", "Historique & Critique").
2. Normalized `<PRIZE>` tags to `<PRICE>` for consistency — the correct tag name used elsewhere is `<PRICE>`. This affected 3 occurrences: `<PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE>`, `<PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE>`, `<PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>L. 27</PRICE>`.
3. Fixed mismatched closing tag in the last BIBL: `<PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE>` had opening `PRIZE` but closing `PRICE` — changed opening to `<PRICE>` to match.
4. Replaced Unicode escape sequences with proper characters: `√§` → `ä` (Buchläden), `√©` → `é` (appellé), `√ü` → `ß` (diß), `√†` → `à` (price indicator), `√≤` → `°` (4°. format). These are OCR/encoding artifacts from the original transcription."}

1. Changed all `&` to `&` in text content to make valid XML (3 occurrences: "Francois & Latin", "Erudition & de Critique", "d'Augmenter son dien & de conserver sa sante", "Historique & Critique").
2. Normalized `<PRIZE>` tags to `<PRICE>` for consistency — the correct tag name used elsewhere is `<PRICE>`. This affected 3 occurrences: `<PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE>`, `<PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE>`, `<PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE>` → `<PRICE>L. 27</PRICE>`.

4. Replaced Unicode escape sequences with proper characters: `√§` → `ä` (Buchläden), `√©` → `é` (appellé), `√ü` → `ß` (diß), `√†` → `à` (price indicator), `√≤` → `°` (4°. format). These are OCR/encoding artifacts from the original transcription.
